opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lower right side is in agony, my stomach is swollen up like a balloon, and I can't stop throwing up green bile. I've got Crohn's and this is so much worse than a normal flare.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain and the bloating have got dramatically worse over the last day, I can't keep anything down and I haven't been able to open my bowels or pass wind at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: the acute crisis started about 24 hours ago and has been building
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly a day of severe worsening, on top of a bad flare
symptom_narrative.character: cramping, colicky pain that comes in waves low down on the right, with a bloated, blown-up feeling and green vomiting
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: absolute agony — I'm curled up in bed and can't move, it's the worst it has ever been
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down on the right side of my belly, but the whole stomach feels swollen
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the pain rolls in waves and the bloating and vomiting keep getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — I've tried lying still
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement, and it got worse every time I tried to eat or drink
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: throwing up green bile over and over, can't pass a bowel motion or wind at all, feeling feverish and sweaty, no appetite
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get flares with crampy pain and diarrhoea, but I have never had the vomiting and this much swelling before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely bedbound, can't keep any food or water down

past_medical_history.how_managed: was put on a tablet to calm the immune system but I stopped it around 6 months ago because of the side effects

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-running loose bowel motions and crampy right-sided pain
painful skin tags and an old fistula near the back passage that had to be drained before
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: over the last couple of years

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a lot of unintentional weight loss and feeling wiped out and exhausted

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an immune-calming tablet for my Crohn's (I think it starts with 'aza')

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with partner, who is with me and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: heart rate about 115 and oxygen 98% on a home fingertip clip
abdomen looks visibly swollen and blown-up on video; patient is curled up, writhing and clearly in severe pain
emesis basin by the bed holding green, bile-coloured fluid
partner reports she is bedbound, cannot keep any food or water down, and has not passed a bowel motion or wind since it started
weight has dropped to around 60 kg on the home scales and she looks very thin
